design_notes.value_system: Each recipe requires: (1) specific material categories, and (2) a minimum total value from the cards played. Players combine any cards meeting the category requirements whose values sum to the threshold or higher.

craft_types.camp: Persistent tableau items. Improve long-term survival each round.
craft_types.zone_use: Must be activated in the matching zone to produce value. Stays in hand until used.
craft_types.recovery: Immediate one-time effect. Discarded after use.

design_notes.cook_bonus: Food items with a cookBonus field produce their better effect when consumed with a Campfire or Cooking Setup in tableau.

items.name: Lean-To
items.description: Basic shelter. Rest action restores +2 Warmth instead of +1.
items.notes: Minimum wood and fiber. Any value combination reaching 4 works.

items.name: Sturdy Shelter
items.description: Solid construction. Rest restores +3 Warmth. Reduces Animal Attack morale loss by 1.
items.notes: Needs mix of good materials to reach threshold. Straight Sapling or Thick Log required in practice.

items.name: Debris Hut
items.description: Expert shelter. Rest restores +4 Warmth. Sleep action grants +1 bonus Morale.
items.notes: Requires a value-3 wood card (Hardwood Bough) to reach threshold realistically.

items.name: Campfire
items.description: Reduces environment warmth pressure by 1 each round. Enables cooking food for bonus effects.
items.notes: Core camp item. Most food and water crafts depend on this being in tableau.

items.name: Sustained Fire
items.description: Reduces warmth pressure by 2 each round for 4 rounds. Enables cooking.
items.notes: Stone fire ring extends the burn. Duration tracked in tableau.

items.name: Signal Fire
items.description: Reduces warmth pressure by 1. Enables cooking. Generates +1 Rescue progress each round.
items.notes: Needs Flint or Dry Fungus to reach threshold. Best fire investment for rescue-focused players.

items.name: Boiled Water
items.description: Treated water. +4 Hydration. Requires Campfire or Sustained Fire in tableau.
items.notes: The primary safe hydration source. Campfire dependency is intentional.

items.name: Water Filter
items.description: Passive water treatment. Unsafe water consumed counts as safe. Draw 1 extra water card when at River.
items.notes: Alternative to campfire for hydration. Negates Waterborne Illness hazard.

items.name: Water Collection Rig
items.description: Collects and treats water passively. +1 Hydration per round. Unsafe water counts as safe.
items.notes: Best long-term water solution. Frees up explore actions from water gathering.

items.name: Snare
items.description: Place at Meadow with Snare Bait. Next turn: draw produces +4 Hunger food catch instead of normal draw.
items.notes: Delayed food source. Requires Snare Bait card to activate. Strong return for fiber investment.

items.name: Fishing Pole
items.description: Use at River. All fish drawn this turn add +2 Hunger bonus. Reusable.
items.notes: Straight Sapling (value 2) makes threshold easier. Reusable each visit to River.

items.name: Bow
items.description: Use in Forest. Draw 1 hunt card — success deals +6 Hunger, failure costs 1 Hunger.
items.notes: Hardwood Bough (value 3) required to reach threshold. High risk, high reward.

items.name: Drying Rack
items.description: Preserve cooked food. Cooked meals produce +1 extra Hunger. Prevents food spoilage.
items.notes: Pairs with Campfire. Makes cooking loop more efficient.

items.name: Stone Tool
items.description: Draw 1 extra card each time you Search a zone.
items.notes: Easiest tool to build. River Stone x2 gets you there. Compounds value fast.

items.name: Cutting Tool
items.description: Draw 1 extra card when Searching. Reduce value threshold of next craft by 1.
items.notes: Flint or Obsidian Shard makes this much easier. Threshold reduction stacks across turns.

items.name: Climbing Staff
items.description: Reduces Rockslide discard from random to player choice. Move action costs 1 less Hydration.
items.notes: Pathfinder synergy. High Ground becomes much safer with this in tableau.

items.name: Basic Poultice
items.description: Simple wound care. +1 Morale and +1 to any one meter.
items.notes: Fast to craft. Good morale patch after a hazard hit.

items.name: Medicine
items.description: Proper treatment. +2 Morale and +2 to any one meter.
items.notes: Medicinal Moss or Medicinal Root needed to reach threshold cleanly.

items.name: Strong Medicine
items.description: Full treatment. +3 Morale, +4 to any one meter, clears all illness flags.
items.notes: Requires Medicinal Root (value 2) and Medicinal Moss (value 2) together in practice.

items.name: Signal Mirror
items.description: Use at High Ground. +4 Rescue progress. Consumed on use.
items.notes: Obsidian Shard (value 2) plus any stone gets there. Best single rescue push.

items.name: Signal Kit
items.description: Use at High Ground with Rescue Signal Site. +6 Rescue immediately, +1 Rescue each round after.
items.notes: Best rescue tool in the game. Pathfinder primary craft. Requires Rescue Signal Site to activate full effect.

items.name: Rescue Cache
items.description: A prepared emergency cache. +5 Rescue, +2 Morale. One of every category required.
items.notes: Hardest craft in the game. Requires one of every category AND high total value. Big payoff.
